title: On Hurt
description: Adds a trigger to call when this entity takes damage.

event.title: Event
event.description:
The event to run when the conditions for this trigger are met.

Sample values:
• blaze: minecraft:on_hurt_event
• ender_crystal: minecraft:crystal_explode

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: The list of conditions for this trigger to execute.

target.title: Target
target.description:
The target of the event.

Sample values:
• blaze: self
